experiences.title: Executive-Design
experiences.headline: Campaign ideation and visuals, social media content, video editing, motion graphics, print assets.
experiences.summary: Led the creative direction for Anil Agarwal Foundation, Nand Ghar, and Animal Care Organization, overseeing the complete design ecosystem from social media and print collateral to integrated campaign concepts and visual storytelling. Partnered with stakeholders to translate social impact goals into engaging creative solutions, ensuring cohesive brand communication across digital, print, and experiential platforms.

experiences.title: Communications Designer
experiences.headline: Campaign ideation and creative strategy, visual identity development, social media content creation, video editing, motion graphics, print collateral design, and end-to-end social media management.
experiences.summary: Managed and designed social media content for 6+ brands, creating campaign concepts, content calendars, and aesthetically cohesive social media grids. Also developed print collateral for select clients, ensuring consistent brand storytelling across digital and offline touchpoints.
experiences.impact: 100% consistency and accuracy, 15% audience engagement increased

experiences.title: Designer
experiences.headline: Creative Ideation, Multimedia Designing, Video editing, Motion Graphics, Client servicing, Marketing.
experiences.summary: My freelance journey began with a passion for art, storytelling, and visual communication. Over the years, I have partnered with brands, creators, and influencers to create illustrations, social media campaigns, motion graphics, and video content. These experiences allowed me to work across diverse creative challenges, strengthen my problem-solving skills, and develop a versatile design style that balances aesthetics with strategic communication.
experiences.impact: worked with 10+ big global brands with 100% satisfactory outcomes

projects.title: KidsToyStore Logo Design
projects.summary: Kids Toy Store is a children's toy brand dedicated to bringing joy, creativity, and learning through play. Offering a wide range of toys for different age groups, the brand aims to create fun and engaging experiences that inspire imagination, curiosity, and childhood development while fostering meaningful moments between children and their families.
projects.whatPrernaDid: Designed the logo identity for KidsToy Store, developing a playful and colorful visual system that reflects the brand's focus on fun, creativity, and childhood imagination. The final design combines engaging toy-inspired elements with a cohesive wordmark to create a memorable and approachable brand identity.

initialSketch.label: Concept
initialSketch.helper: Early sketches, rough routes, mood explorations, draft frames, or work-in-progress visuals.

finalOutput.label: Final Output
finalOutput.helper: Finished campaign visuals, edited videos, final posts, approved layouts, or production-ready assets.

projects.title: Devan's Coffee
projects.tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere pro, After Effects, Figma
projects.summary: Devan's Coffee is a heritage coffee and tea brand known for its rich legacy and premium products. The objective was to strengthen the brand's digital presence by creating visually cohesive and engaging content that reflected its craftsmanship, quality, and authentic coffee culture.
projects.whatPrernaDid: For Devan's Coffee, I developed content strategies, designed social media creatives and aesthetic feed layouts, and created storytelling-led content that highlighted the brand's heritage, products, and coffee culture while maintaining a consistent visual identity across digital platforms.

finalOutput.label: Stories
finalOutput.helper: Finished campaign visuals, edited videos, final posts, approved layouts, or production-ready assets.

projects.title: Music Videos
projects.summary: Avanti Nagral is an independent singer-songwriter, content creator, and digital influencer known for her music, storytelling, and advocacy around identity, culture, and self-expression.
projects.whatPrernaDid: I collaborated on her music content by shooting and editing music videos and promotional video assets, helping translate her artistic vision into engaging visual narratives for digital audiences.

initialSketch.label: Long form Music Video
initialSketch.helper: Early sketches, rough routes, mood explorations, draft frames, or work-in-progress visuals.

projects.title: The Creative Bud
projects.tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere pro, After Effects, Procreate
projects.summary: The Creative Bud was an independent art and design brand built around original illustrations and handcrafted products. The brand aimed to transform everyday stationery and lifestyle items into meaningful, artist-driven experiences through storytelling, creativity, and thoughtful design. By combining traditional craftsmanship with contemporary illustration, The Creative Bud fostered a community that valued creativity, self-expression, and unique handmade products.
projects.whatPrernaDid: Founded and managed The Creative Bud, overseeing brand strategy, product design, illustration, social media marketing, content creation, packaging design, and customer engagement. Developed original artwork and handcrafted product collections while building a loyal community through storytelling-led branding and digital content.

initialSketch.label: Initial Sketches
initialSketch.helper: Early sketches, rough routes, mood explorations, draft frames, or work-in-progress visuals.

projects.title: The Monk world
projects.tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere pro, After Effects
projects.summary: The Monk World is a premium eyewear brand that blends luxury, craftsmanship, and individuality through limited-edition optical frames and sunglasses. The brand aims to position eyewear as a statement of personal style rather than just a functional accessory, emphasizing exclusivity, design, and self-expression.
projects.whatPrernaDid: For The Monk World, I conceptualized and designed social media content that showcased the brand's premium eyewear collections, craftsmanship, and philosophy of individuality. Through storytelling-led creatives and visually cohesive feed designs, the content reinforced the brand's luxury positioning and unique identity.

projects.title: Podcasts
projects.summary: Through collaborations with artists, influencers, and digital media platforms, I explored video editing as a tool for storytelling, audience engagement, and content creation across music and entertainment formats.
projects.whatPrernaDid: Edited long-form videos and social content for creators such as Avanti Nagral and Miss Malini Trending, managing storytelling, pacing, client communication, and post-production. I was also involved in content shoots, contributing to both the production and editing process to create engaging digital experiences.

projects.title: 'KhanaKhayaKya' Campaign
projects.tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere pro, After Effects, Indesign
projects.summary: #KhaanaKhaayaKya (Did you eat?) was an awareness campaign by the Anil Agarwal Foundation that aimed to address child hunger and malnutrition by encouraging public conversations around nutrition, food security, and the importance of ensuring every child has access to healthy meals.
projects.whatPrernaDid: Designed and delivered high-impact visual assets for the campaign, crafting emotionally driven storytelling and awareness-focused creatives that amplified conversations around child nutrition, hunger eradication, and community engagement across digital platforms.

projects.title: 'HunarSePehchaan' Campaign
projects.tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere pro, After Effects
projects.summary:
#HunarSePehchaan (Recognition Through Skills) is an International Women’s Day campaign by the Anil Agarwal Foundation, aligned with the 2024 UN theme “Invest in Women: Accelerate Progress.” The campaign showcases how initiatives like Nand Ghar, TARA, FACOR Sathi Jivika, and Project Sakhi empower women with financial independence and confidence.
Through real transformation stories, it emphasizes that access to learning and livelihood opportunities is essential for every woman. Ultimately, the campaign highlights the importance of skill development and economic empowerment, urging society to recognize women for their achievements and capabilities.
projects.whatPrernaDid: Developed the creative direction for the Hunar Se Pehchaan campaign by creating campaign concepts, moodboards, and visual storytelling frameworks. Produced logo animations and narrative-driven content that showcased the impact of Anil Agarwal Foundation and Nand Ghar's initiatives in women's skill development, empowerment, and community transformation across digital platforms.

portfolioProjects.impact: Shows personal style, detail, product thinking, and client-led creative execution

work.headline: Choose an experience to see the work created inside it.

featured.headline: Browse selected campaigns, visuals, motion pieces, and illustration work.

about.headline: Designer, Storyteller & Creative Problem Solver
body: Hi, I am Prerna, a designer, storyteller, and lifelong creative. I've always loved finding ways to turn ideas into something people can see, feel, and connect with. My journey has taken me through Graphic Designing, Branding, Social Media, Illustration, Video Editing, Motion Graphics, and emerging media, allowing me to work on everything from social impact campaigns to music videos and creative businesses. What excites me most is the opportunity to tell meaningful stories, solve creative challenges, and create work that resonates with people long after they've seen it.

contact.headline: Open to graphic design, branding, motion, and multimedia roles.
